case_title: ROBERT MICALLEF VS. JOE NEWELL et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-07-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
